# WebX Solution
> Premium Websites, Ads & WhatsApp Automation for Businesses.

## Main Services
- [Websites](https://webx-12dfae.gitlab.io/): High-speed websites built mobile-first, found on Google, live in days — not months.
- [Google & Meta Ads](https://webx-12dfae.gitlab.io/): Campaigns measured in calls and orders, not impressions. You see exactly where every rupee goes.
- [Reels & Short Video](https://webx-12dfae.gitlab.io/): Content people actually stop scrolling for. Shot, cut and posted on a schedule that keeps you visible.
- [Reviews](https://webx-12dfae.gitlab.io/): More five-star proof, less chasing customers for it. We set up the system; the reviews follow.
- [WhatsApp Chatbots](https://webx-12dfae.gitlab.io/): Replies at 2am without you being awake. Capture leads, answer FAQs, take bookings — automatically.
- [Animation](https://webx-12dfae.gitlab.io/): Logo stings, explainers and motion graphics that make your brand stick in people's heads.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
- **What services does WebX Solution offer?** WebX Solution builds high-performance websites, manages search and social media ad campaigns (Google/Meta), produces engaging short-form video content (Reels), and sets up automated WhatsApp chatbots and Google Business Profile review engines.
- **How much do your services cost?** We work with clear, one-time project setup packages (typically between ₹15,000 and ₹50,000 depending on scope) rather than confusing monthly retainers. Ongoing ad management or active monthly optimizations can be bundled as separate retainers.
- **How fast will my project go live?** Basic websites, local Google Business Profiles, and initial WhatsApp automated booking channels are typically designed, tested, and launched within 5 to 7 business days.
- **How do we get started?** Simply click the "Start a project" button to reach us directly on WhatsApp at +919528725759. We'll analyze your current online footprint and send over a customized action plan within 24 hours.
